_note: Chapter 12 — the wedding in the aleph. Stretcher-side -> Mona -> Molly -> the gate -> 3Jane -> the crossroads.

c12_doors.name: Factory Doors — Night
c12_doors.desc: Torchlight through rust, the yard full of cooling wreckage and patient machines. You walk in past a two-and-a-half-meter sculpture of judgment that lowers its blades as you pass — and every dream since Jamaica clicks into place like a key turning. You have been here a hundred nights. You have never been here.

c12_floor.name: Factory Floor — Torchlight
c12_floor.desc: They watch you cross the floor — the sculptor, the prophet, the med-tech girl — the way people watch weather arrive. None of them try to stop you. The dreams walked you here; the last few meters you walk yourself.

c12_stretcher.name: The Stretcher — the Gray Box
c12_stretcher.desc: He's thinner than the boy from Jammer's, and older, and the cables run from his skull to a gray slab that holds a country. The monitors count what's left of him in amber. Inside the lace, at the very edge of hearing: your name, said like a porch light being turned on.
